MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ORBELIAN, HARRY ORBELIAN, VERA SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUN-06-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 07 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 07
JURY TRIAL CONTINUED TO JUN-07-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 05

10:30 AM COURT CALLED TO ORDER. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. ATTORNEY ARNOLD EVJE MADE A MOTION IN LIMINE. DEFENDANT HOOPER WAS VOIR DIRED BY COURT CONCERNING HER FINANCIAL STATUS. UPON ORDER OF THE COURT, CLERK CALLED FOR A JURY PANEL. ONE WAS NOT AVAILABLE UNTIL JUNE 7, 1995, 9AM. CASE IS CONTINUED UNTIL JUNE 7, 1995. 9AM.
JURY TRIAL CONTINUED TO JUN-07-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 07

JUDGE NORRIS GOODWIN, L.NAJERA/CSR, K.LEE/CLERK ARNOLD EVJE FOR THE PLAINTIFF LAUREL HOOPER IN PRO PER FOR THE DEFENDANT 09:08AM CAUSE CALLED FOR JURY TRIAL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT ATTENDANCE IS TAKEN PROSPECTIVE JURORS ARE ADMINISTERED OATH 10:00AM CASE SETTLED. TERMS ON THE RECORD. 10:01AM JURY PANEL IS ASKED TO RETURN TO THE JURY COMMISSIONER.
